# Issue templates

> Forms shown when opening an issue. Disable blank issues via `config.yml`.

## When to use which

| Template | Use when |
|---|---|
| `bug.yml` | Something is broken or behaves wrong |
| `feature.yml` | A new capability or change in scope is requested |
| `incident.yml` | Production is degraded; security or data is at risk |

For private security disclosures, **do not** open an issue. Email `security@<domain>` per [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).
